name: AI Strategy
purpose: Analyzes business processes to identify automation and AI augmentation opportunities, builds agentization roadmaps, assesses AI readiness and implementation sequencing.
trigger_conditions: Request involves identifying where automation or AI can replace, assist, or orchestrate human work
Request involves AI readiness assessment, process automation design, or agent operating model
Request involves identifying repetitive, high-volume, or rules-based work as automation candidates
Request involves deciding whether to automate, augment, or keep human-owned
Request involves designing an AI rollout or agentization roadmap
anti_trigger_conditions: Request is purely financial modeling without automation angle
Request is tactical execution of an already-decided approach
Request is about external AI products or vendors without internal process angle
